text:
is an Angel that is original to the Shin Japan Heroes Universe Amusement World attraction. It was introduced in the Shin 765 Operation event. https://twitter.com/SJHA_World/status/1552942017176408064 6:00 AM · Jul 29, 2022 

Profile

A eight legged spider-like being with rings around its legs. The coloring is black and red.

History

Shin 765 Operation

Development

Observing the illustration, it appears to be hold similarities with the Kumo Augment-01 character from the Shin Kamen Rider film.

K-type is likely to be from , meaning spider in English.

Altering the brightness of the image, can show more details to the design. https://twitter.com/EvaEx2/status/1553647577483997184
